info.title: DocAssembler
info.description: Tool to assemble documentation from various locations and change links where necessary.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
DocAssembler.
Assemble documentation in the output folder. The tool will also fix links following configuration.

Return values:
0 - succesfull.
1 - some warnings, but process could be completed.
2 - a fatal error occurred.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Intialize a configuration file in the current directory if it doesn't exist yet.
